root_text.an5.239:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.239:1.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.239:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an5.239:2.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an5.239:1.1: “Mendicants, a resident mendicant with five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.239:1.7: And they waste a gift given in faith.
translation_text.an5.239:1.8: A resident mendicant with these five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.239:2.1: A resident mendicant with five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.239:2.7: And they don’t waste a gift given in faith.
translation_text.an5.239:2.8: A resident mendicant with these five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
